change.diff_summary: Switched diffusion noise schedule from cosine to linear (1e-4 to 0.02)

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: A linear beta schedule is better suited for smooth time series data like ILI than the cosine schedule designed for natural images.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Linear schedule provides a more uniform noise distribution across 30 diffusion steps, allowing the denoiser to learn more consistent denoising patterns for smooth ILI signals.
jury_reasoning.expected_delta: expect Test MAE to decrease from 20.94 to ~18-20

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Switch noise schedule cosine->linear for diffusion
